mapper.select: SELECT SR.request_id, TO_CHAR(SR.request_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS request_date, TO_CHAR(SR.due_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS due_date, SR.request_status, V.vender_name, V.vender_type, E.ename, I.name, I.type FROM shipment_request SR JOIN vender V ON SR.vender_num = V.vender_num JOIN emp E ON V.emp_num = E.emp_num JOIN item I ON SR.item_num = I.item_num ORDER BY SR.request_id DESC

SELECT SR.request_id, TO_CHAR(SR.request_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS request_date, TO_CHAR(SR.due_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS due_date, SR.request_status, V.vender_name, V.vender_type, E.ename, I.name, I.type FROM shipment_request SR JOIN vender V ON SR.vender_num = V.vender_num JOIN emp E ON V.emp_num = E.emp_num JOIN item I ON SR.item_num = I.item_num WHERE 1 = 1
AND SR.request_status = #{status}
AND upper(I.type) = upper(#{type})
AND ( upper(V.vender_name) LIKE ('%' || upper(#{keyword}) || '%') OR upper(SR.request_id) LIKE ('%' || upper(#{keyword}) || '%') )
AND SR.request_date >= TO_DATE(#{sDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND SR.request_date < TO_DATE(#{eDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND SR.request_date < SYSDATE + 1
ORDER BY SR.request_id DESC
SELECT V.vender_num, V.vender_name, V.vender_type, E.ename FROM vender V JOIN emp E ON V.emp_num = E.emp_num WHERE upper(V.vender_name) LIKE '%' || upper(#{_parameter}) || '%' ORDER BY V.vender_name
SELECT item_num, code, name, type, unit FROM item ORDER BY type, name
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'REQ' || LPAD(REQUEST_SEQ.NEXTVAL, 4, '0') FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO shipment_request (request_id, request_date, vender_num, due_date, request_status, item_num) VALUES (#{request_id}, SYSDATE, #{vender_num}, TO_DATE(#{due_date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), '대기', #{item_num})
